source: index.html hiker-app seed (AT/PCT/CDT waypoint arrays + trek segments)
note: Read-only snapshot for the Conservancy Console Baseline page (D18). Regenerate from index.html whenever the hiker seed changes. Waypoint rows are RAW seed arrays [mile,name,state,lat,lon,...] so the console can build prior_payload that tdApplyOverlay matches exactly. Trek segments carry id/name/state/miles/cumMileStart/cumMileEnd/ascentFtPerMi/descentFtPerMi.
